system.description:
### Tier 1 Standard The Blood Pack mercenaries o0ften employ Vorcha for their resilience and aggression. This variant focuses on area denial and punishing stationary players. Motives & Tactics: Flush out cover, regenerate, burn A fragile, bipedal security robot programmed for mass deployment. They march forward firing indiscriminately.

#### Features Pyro-Shielding - Passive: The Vorcha takes half damage from fire-based attacks.

Vent Heat - Action: Mark a Stress to unleash a burst of flame in a cone. All targets within Very Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 1d6 ene damage and they must mark 1 Shield Slot without gaining its benefits due to thermal overload.

Resilient Biology - Reaction: When the Vorcha marks HP, you can spend a Fear to immediately clear 1 Stress.

}}
